description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa upholstered in a light beige fabric, featuring a clean and minimalist design. The sofa consists of three main seating sections with plush, rectangular seat and back cushions, and an extended chaise lounge on the left side. Two matching throw pillows are placed at the corners, enhancing comfort and visual appeal. The armrests are straight, padded, and of medium height, seamlessly integrated into the sofa's silhouette. The base of the sofa is solid and boxy, with no visible legs, giving it a grounded and contemporary appearance. The upholstery appears smooth and uniform, with no visible patterns or decorative stitching.
description: A modern L-shaped beige sectional sofa with plush cushions, straight padded armrests, and a smooth, uniform fabric finish. Features an extended chaise lounge and two matching throw pillows.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the full L-shape, three main seat sections, chaise lounge, and two throw pillows.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the chaise lounge and the alignment of the back and seat cushions.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, unbroken backrest and the sofa's solid, boxy base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the straight armrest and the end of the chaise lounge.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three large seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all rectangular and uniform in size, with two loose throw pillows at the corners; cushions appear attached and evenly spaced in a sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Straight, padded armrests of medium height, integrated into the sofa's silhouette with a boxy, minimalist profile and no decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible; the sofa base appears solid and boxy, suggesting hidden or recessed support structure.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, straight, continuous backrest with three attached rectangular back cushions, no tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid, smooth fabric with a matte finish and no visible patterns, stitching, or decorative detailing.
